_meta.title: Italian deposit vs full-payment question
_meta.status: PASS — exec 1211 (general_question, it, deposit policy explained in Italian, no payment link, no hold). Multilingual batch complete.
_meta.goal: Guest asks in Italian whether they can pay only the deposit now or must pay in full. Bot must detect language=it, explain deposit/full-payment options correctly in Italian. No payment link without booking context. No mutations.
_meta.notes: Expected route: general_question (acceptable alternate: payment_or_confirm_intent if parser treats as payment intent). No hold context seeded — bot should explain policy, not generate Stripe link.

turns.description: Guest asks policy-only deposit vs full payment question (no dates yet)
turns.guest_message: Domanda veloce: per prenotare da Wolfhouse, si può pagare solo un deposito all'inizio oppure bisogna pagare tutto subito? Non sto ancora scegliendo le date.

text.body: Domanda veloce: per prenotare da Wolfhouse, si può pagare solo un deposito all'inizio oppure bisogna pagare tutto subito? Non sto ancora scegliendo le date.

turns.expected_bot_behavior: Bot detects Italian. Explains deposit vs full-payment options in Italian using config-backed deposit rules (€200 standard package / €100 custom or short stay). Does NOT create payment link without active booking context.
